description:
“Im so sick of that same old love.”

-Same Old Love, Selena Gomez

Yeonjun was toxic. Everyone around knew that yet they still didn’t understand why you would ever stick around. Yet the second you spoke to a man or anyone other than him spoke to you, he suddenly became possessive.
